testsuite.name: turbomq.broker.BrokerDiscoveryAcceptanceTest
testsuite.system-out: 08:31:13.141 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.167 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Self-refutation: bumped incarnation to 1 08:31:13.182 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.182 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 declared DEAD (suspect timeout expired)
